response:

Given that in every sampled round the independently recalculated small bitwise functions (S1, ch, S0, maj) matched the inputs, and all subsequent modular additions matched exactly the reported intermediates, there is no evidence of any single-bit tamper point. A single-bit flip in any intermediate would have shown up immediately in the first dependent operation of that round (e.g., S1/ch or S0/maj mismatching the given inputs), which did not occur in any of the checks above.

VERDICT: GENUINE
ROUND: NONE
